statement: In every magma, Equation 1545 (`x = (y * y) * (z * (z * z))`) implies Equation 3078 (`x = (((x * y) * y) * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0086
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op z (op z z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op x y) y) y) x)
